title: A perfectly timed nap
caption: Grey seal sleeping on the beach, Orkney Islands, Scotland
copyright: Grey seal sleeping on the beach, Orkney Islands, Scotland (© Andrew Mason/Minden Pictures)
description: National Napping Day couldn't be better timed. It falls on the Monday after Daylight Saving Time begins, when clocks move forward and we all lose an hour of sleep. Consider today an official excuse to slow down and make up for it. The sleeping grey seal in this image, spotted along Scotland's coast, is a fitting reminder for the day: rest matters.
